title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.474 - Failure to abide by requirements, board may reprimand
text:
256.474.  Failure to abide by requirements, board may reprimand. — A registered person, firm or corporation practicing geology may be reprimanded by the board for failure to abide by the requirements of sections 256.450 to 256.483.  The board may impose limitations, conditions or restrictions upon the practice of a geologist-registrant in-training or a registered geologist who is reprimanded under this section.
(L. 1994 S.B. 649)
